metadata.title: Résona — Your resume, aligned to every opportunity.
metadata.description: AI-powered resume and job-match analysis. Get your match score, close the gaps, and rewrite your resume for every application.
metadata.ogDescription: Your resume, aligned to every opportunity.

landing.tagline: Your resume, aligned to every opportunity.
landing.subtitle: Most resumes are rejected by ATS before a human ever reads them. We ensure yours makes it through with technical precision and architectural clarity.
landing.featureScoreBody: Our proprietary algorithm simulates top-tier ATS logic, providing a definitive alignment percentage against specific job descriptions.
landing.featureGapBody: Identifying missing critical technical keywords and experience markers that recruiters look for first.
landing.featureRewriteBody: Transforming passive descriptions into high-impact, data-driven achievements that resonate with decision makers.
landing.featureCoverBody: Generate precisely tailored narratives that bridge the gap between your history and the company's future.
landing.processStep1Body: Drop your current CV in PDF or DOCX format. Our parser extracts structural data with 99.9% accuracy.
landing.processStep2Body: Compare against millions of data points and industry-specific benchmarks to identify alignment gaps.
landing.processStep3Body: Receive a comprehensive report and an optimized version of your profile ready for submission.
landing.trustBody: Résona eliminates the guesswork of job hunting through factual data and architectural resume construction.

auth.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

upload.dropzoneHint: Drag and drop or click to browse (PDF only, max 5MB)

upload.heroSubtitle: Our precision-engineered engine benchmarks your professional trajectory against specific industry requirements.
upload.tipPdf: Ensure your resume is in PDF format for the most accurate structural extraction.
upload.encryptedNotice: Your data is encrypted and private.

analyzing.title: Analyzing Profile
analyzing.subtitle: Cross-referencing historical performance data with current industry benchmarks.

results.noRecommendations: No specific recommendations were flagged — your resume is well matched to this role.
results.highDescription: Your resume shows a strong technical alignment with the {jobTitle} role.
results.highDescriptionSkillSingular: Strengthening the missing skill could push you into the top percentile.
results.highDescriptionSkillPlural: Strengthening specific missing skills could push you into the top percentile.
results.strongDescriptionSingular: Your resume aligns well with the {jobTitle} role. Closing the {count} gap identified below would meaningfully strengthen your application.
results.strongDescriptionPlural: Your resume aligns well with the {jobTitle} role. Closing the {count} gaps identified below would meaningfully strengthen your application.
results.roomDescriptionSingular: Your resume covers some ground for the {jobTitle} role, but {count} key area could use attention before you apply.
results.roomDescriptionPlural: Your resume covers some ground for the {jobTitle} role, but {count} key areas could use attention before you apply.
results.semanticSimilarityTooltip: Computed from vector embeddings stored in Postgres (pgvector), independent of the AI's language-based match score above.

pricing.proDescription: For an active job search, without limits.

legal.privacyIntro: Résona is a portfolio project. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you can control it — written plainly rather than in dense legal language.
legal.privacySection1Body:
When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and profile picture (via Google OAuth) or your email and a hashed password (via email sign-up).

When you use the analysis features, we store the resume files you upload, the text extracted from them, and the job description text you submit for comparison.

If you subscribe to Pro, Stripe processes your payment details directly — we only store your Stripe customer ID and subscription status, never your card details.
legal.privacySection2Body: Your resume and job description text are used to generate match scores, gap analysis, section rewrites, and cover letters. Your applications (company, role, status) are stored so you can track them on your dashboard. We do not use your resume content for any purpose other than providing these features to you.
legal.privacySection3Body:
Résona relies on the following third-party services to operate:

  • Groq — generates match analysis, section rewrites, and cover letters from your resume and job description text.
  • HuggingFace — computes text embeddings used to calculate your match score.
  • UploadThing — stores your uploaded resume files.
  • Neon — hosts our PostgreSQL database.
  • Stripe — processes Pro plan payments.
  • Sentry — error monitoring; only technical error data, never resume content.

We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
legal.privacySection4Body: You can delete individual resumes and analyses at any time from your resume history. You may request full account deletion, which removes your account and all associated resumes, analyses, and applications, by contacting us.
legal.privacySection5Body: You can access, export, or delete your data at any time. Since Résona is a portfolio project rather than a production service handling large-scale personal data, requests are handled directly and promptly — reach out and we'll take care of it.
legal.privacySection6Body: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt and never stored in plain text. All traffic is encrypted in transit (TLS). Authentication is handled by NextAuth, including Google OAuth sign-in.
legal.privacySection7Body: We may update this policy as the product evolves. Material changes will be reflected here with an updated date.
legal.termsIntro: These terms govern your use of Résona. As with our <link>Privacy Policy</link>, we've kept this in plain language rather than dense legal text.
legal.termsSection1Body: By creating an account or using Résona, you agree to these terms. Résona is provided as a portfolio project demonstrating an AI-powered resume and job-match analysis product, not a commercial service with guaranteed uptime or support SLAs.
legal.termsSection2Body: Résona analyzes your resume against a job description to produce a match score, identify matching and missing skills, rewrite resume sections, and generate cover letters. These outputs are generated by third-party AI models (Groq, HuggingFace) and are provided for your convenience.
legal.termsSection3Body: Match scores, gap analysis, rewrites, and cover letters are AI-assisted suggestions. They are not guaranteed to be accurate, complete, or effective, and should be reviewed and edited before you use them in a real job application. Résona makes no guarantee about interview or hiring outcomes.
legal.termsSection4Body: You retain full ownership of the resume content and job descriptions you submit. We do not claim any intellectual property rights over content you upload, and we only process it to provide the analysis features described in this document and in our Privacy Policy.
legal.termsSection5Body: Résona offers a Free plan with limited monthly analyses and a Pro plan with unlimited analyses, section rewriting, and cover letter generation. Pro subscriptions are billed through Stripe and can be cancelled at any time from your billing settings; access continues until the end of the current billing period.
legal.termsSection6Body: You agree not to use Résona to upload unlawful content, attempt to circumvent rate limits or usage quotas, or interfere with the service's normal operation.
legal.termsSection7Body: The service is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied. Résona and its author are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the service, including decisions made based on AI-generated analysis or content.
legal.termsSection8Body: We may suspend or terminate access to accounts that violate these terms. You may stop using Résona and request account deletion at any time.
legal.termsSection9Body: We may update these terms as the product evolves. Material changes will be reflected here with an updated date.

builtWith.title: Built with
builtWith.subtitle: The real stack behind Résona, and why each piece was chosen.
builtWith.frontendItem1Detail: App Router, hybrid rendering, edge-ready deploys.
builtWith.aiItem1Detail: Near-instant inference for scoring, rewriting, cover letters.
builtWith.aiItem2Detail: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 sentence embeddings, decoupled from the generation model.
builtWith.dataItem1Detail: Serverless Postgres with the pgvector extension enabled.
builtWith.dataItem2Detail: Native vector similarity search in the database — no external vector store.
builtWith.dataItem3Detail: Typed migrations, raw SQL for vector-column operations.
builtWith.platformItem2Detail: Real Checkout, Customer Portal, and webhook-driven plan sync.
builtWith.platformItem3Detail: Sliding-window rate limiting that works in serverless functions.
builtWith.platformItem4Detail: File handling without a self-managed storage backend.
builtWith.platformItem5Detail: EN/FR locale routing and message catalogs.
builtWith.platformItem7Detail: CI/CD native to the Next.js framework.
